title: Dreamy Skies: Skybox
description: Sky Aesthetics resource pack. Adds a fantasy solar system to your skies!
body:
Made for
[Sky Aesthetics](https://modrinth.com/mod/sky-aesthetics)

I started a previous project I at the time had named GoG Esque using a mod called celestials or something but it was really difficult to use in any packs I made so when sky aesthetics came along I gave it a second go

- All art in project is hand made.
- Adds a planetary skybox around the world.
- Made for compatibility in mind.
- Works with most shaders! not 100% compatible
![SunRise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c7c80a396d1f8de342c83cb6e761db6c7758f8d.png)
![Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f8ef696541a2f73f1265e7ff172a8a3dc07f053.png)
